channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 14th July
item.description:
Repeat offender , poor prevention means this will keep happening sadly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass between paving slabs in beal close, 14th July
item.description:
Resident has called today to report that the grass in-between the paving slabs in beal close is causing a trip hazard, please can this be looked into before someone hurts themselves.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darenth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal, 14th July
item.description:
Not safe for children who play around this area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kinglake Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes as picture eother Fly Tipping or off a vehicle, 14th July
item.description:
The rubbish as in the picture has appeared on the footpath of the North Cray Road at the point of the Footpath 144 not sure how it got there but will attract more rubbish until removed, thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cray Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Banging manhole cover, 14th July
item.description:
Your enquiry reference is 9735083. I reported this problem to you and you said it was Thames Water problem they have come out again and said it has nothing to do with them it’s a highways fault if you look at your records you will see that it is your responsibility the manhole cover number is B73K every time we have reported this issue it goes back and forth.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bike blocking pavement, 14th July
item.description:
Blocking pavement at a disabled parking bay

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Ledbury Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At start of Langley rd, 14th July
item.description:
Another fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langley Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 126, Southborough Road Greater London, England BR1 2ER, 14th July
item.description:
Mapped Highways maintained manhole 361k is loose and rocking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree overhanging garden, 14th July
item.description:
Resident reports large tree in Shaftesbury Park is overhanging his garden and needs to be trimmed back. This is overhanging his back garden of 228 Rangefield Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rangefield Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Looks like self assembly furniture, 14th July
item.description:
On pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbour dumping lots of household rubbish at rear of property 14 Coupland Place, 14th July
item.description:
Dumping excessive amount of rubbish into council shrubbery bed which is directly in front of 24-26 Coupland Place
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Margarets Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish post bin collections, 14th July
item.description:
Each week we are left with rubbish over stairs, pathways, green banks and car park. Residents have been cleaning themselves but this is happening on a weekly basis when the bin men are left to drag the rubbish down the stairs and do not clear anything that falls out. It can be a hazard on the stairs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beddington Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous Oxide canister, 14th July
item.description:
Must have been dumped by vehicle user.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple waste bags blocking pavement, 14th July
item.description:
Corner of lordship lane blocked by rubbish in biffa bags . Unsure what the contents are. Present for 1 week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spray-painted white markings on a concrete sidewalk, 14th July
item.description:
We found spray-painted white markings on a concrete pavement outside our property and we are concerned that it could either be malicious or marked deliberately by the Council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Kenley Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of metal fly tipped, 14th July
item.description:
This is now the 2nd time in 2 weeks that fly tipping has occurred here!! Pile of odd shaped metal on the pathway, trip hazard to the public.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Owenite Street, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass on road, 14th July
item.description:
Glass on the road 30 Tavistock Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tavistock Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive noise from vehicles, 14th July
item.description:
Brayards Road is being used as a transit road through Peckham. This makes the road very noisy at night and during the day. Can traffic restrictions be put in place to make sure Queens Road, Lausanne Road and Evelyn Road are maintained as the driving roads and not small residential streets
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 137, Brayards Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree with low branches, 14th July
item.description:
Encroaching pavement outside number 45 Preston Drive Dangerous for pedestrians especially children and those in wheelchairs and prams

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Preston Drive, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned ford b-max, 14th July
